Emrys Galewright is the founder of Glintworks Co. Emrys wants a technical co-founder intro before committing.

Lichenloop is a seed-stage company. Founded by Priya Duskfield. The seed conversation started in 2025.

Tidepool Partners is an early-stage fund that co-invests on seed rounds.

turns.text: Draft a memo for the partner meeting: Priya Duskfield and Emrys Galewright both want Tidepool Partners in the Lichenloop round.
Make the memo lead with traction, then risks, then the ask.
